pkgmetadata.longdescription:
AWS OpsWorks provides a simple and flexible way to create and manage stacks and applications. With AWS OpsWorks, you can provision AWS resources, manage their configuration, deploy applications to those resources, and monitor their health.
/See:/ <http://docs.aws.amazon.com/opsworks/latest/APIReference/Welcome.html AWS API Reference>
/Warning:/ This is an experimental preview release which is still under heavy development and not intended for public consumption, caveat emptor!
